channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Houston dominates Tennessee, punches ticket to Final Four
item.description: The Houston Cougars have now won 17 consecutive games, the longest active winning streak in college basketball in the nation. Houston will face Duke in the Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores his 890th career goal to move 5 goals away from breaking Gretzky’s NHL record
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — For Alex Ovechkin, scoring the 890th goal of his career wasn't such a sweet moment; in fact, moving five goals away from breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record didn't matter much to the 39-year-old after an 8-5 loss at the hands of the Buffalo Sabres.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rafael Devers fans twice more to give him an MLB-record 12 in Red Sox's first 4 games
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Boston Red Sox designated hitter Rafael Devers became the first major leaguer to strike out 12 times in a season’s first four games. Devers went 0 for 4 with two more strikeouts Sunday in Boston’s 3-2 loss to the Texas Rangers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Denny Hamlin ends 10-year win drought at Martinsville Speedway
item.description: MARTINSVILLE, Va. (AP) — Denny Hamlin ended an agonizing 10-year winless streak at Martinsville Speedway, holding off teammate Christopher Bell in his home state to secure a spot in the NASCAR Cup Series playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge homers again, Chisholm Jr. goes deep twice as Yanks rout Brewers 12-3 to complete 3-game sweep
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge homered in his first at-bat, Jazz Chisholm Jr. homered twice and the New York Yankees went deep four more times in a 12-3 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Sunday, a day after becoming the third team in major league history to hit nine homers in a game.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Torpedo-shaped bats draw attention after Yankees hit team-record 9 homers in rout of Brewers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New torpedo bats drew attention when the New York Yankees hit a team-record nine homers that traveled a combined 3,695 feet on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: LARRY FLEISHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Austin Hill gives Richard Childress Racing its 100th Xfinity Series win in Martinsville
item.description: It was a bumpy race Saturday in Martinsville, Virginia, with nearly a dozen caution flags coming out across the night, but in the end, Austin Hill took the victory.
item.dc:creator: Mike Costanza, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Can Villanova rise into a championship contender again? Wildcats bank on Kevin Willard to lead them
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Kevin Willard publicly campaigned — pleaded, really — during Maryland's run to the Sweet 16 for more from the university and athletic department for his Big Ten program.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Tucker homers as the Cubs hold off the Diamondbacks for a 4-3 win
item.description: Kyle Tucker hit his first home run with the Chicago Cubs, leading his new team to a 4-3 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr. rallies Florida into Final Four with 84-79 March Madness win over Texas Tech
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Coach Todd Golden cut the final strand of the net, waved it to the crowd and performed the famed Gator Chomp. A celebration that seemed completely improbable just a few minutes earlier was in high gear. Florida is heading back to the Final Four. Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA great Shaquille O'Neal's son Shaqir leaving Florida A&M and transferring again: report
item.description: Shaqir O'Neal will enter the transfer portal, On3 reported. The junior forward started 17 games for Florida A&M last season after two years at Texas Southern.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: School board pleads with Trump admin to force state ban on transgenders in girls sports as Democrats refuse
item.description: A Washington state school board is pleading for intervention from the federal government to force the state to ban transgender athletes from girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Transgender athletes open up about suing Trump administration over bans from girls sports
item.description: Two New Hampshire transgender athletes opened up about their lawsuit against President Donald Trump's administration over recent trans athlete bans in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bryan Hodgson named University of South Florida head men's basketball coach
item.description: Bryan Hodgson, one of the nation’s top recruiters and a rising head coach, has been named the University of South Florida head men’s basketball coach, Vice President for Athletics Michael Kelly announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
